items.summary: Replace the initial List<Bool> representation seam with abstract Bool and List capabilities once those carrier APIs stabilize.
Implement A0010↔A0003 packing behind BytePacking and prove aligned and padded round-trip laws.
Replace the temporary meta-level NatByteSequence vectors with the abstract proof-bearing list API once its carrier and elementwise-predicate interfaces stabilize.
Add unsigned/signed LEB128 as variable-length byte relations with canonicality, termination, and bounded-width overflow evidence.
Realize PartialCompilerComputabilityFacts from concrete compiler preservation/reflection bundles.
Realize partial/total computability facts for concrete Machine theories without treating finite host runs as proofs.
Supply checked equivalences among concrete computation models; do not assume a Church-Turing thesis.
